_readme: The accepted-risk allowlist for the scheduled maintenance sweep (docs/MAINTENANCE-AUTOMATION.md Phase 2). Supabase advisories whose NAME is in `acceptedByName`, or whose (name, target) pair is in `acceptedByTarget`, are consciously accepted and stay silent. Anything else is a NEW finding the sweep surfaces. Add an entry ONLY with a one-line rationale + an ADR/doc reference. Removing an entry re-arms the sweep for that class.

acceptedByName.extension_in_public: ADR-507 — pgvector/postgis/pg_trgm stay in public (type/operator providers; moving them is high-blast-radius for negligible gain).
acceptedByName.rls_enabled_no_policy: Deny-all is fail-closed — service-role-only tables reachable only via the admin client (scripts/rls-deny-all.txt, guarded by check:rls). Nothing exposed.
acceptedByName.anon_security_definer_function_executabl: Definers scope via auth.uid() + pinned search_path (ADR-004); anon EXECUTE returns nothing without a session. Public feed/discover RPCs are intentionally anon-callable.
acceptedByName.authenticated_security_definer_function_: Same posture as the anon case (ADR-004); authed EXECUTE is scoped inside the function.
acceptedByName.unused_index: Pre-traffic noise — dropping an index the workload hasn't exercised is guessing. Revisit after real production traffic (META-SCAN-STATUS).

_notDeliberatelyOmitted.auth_allow_anonymous_sign_ins: FIXED by the owner (disabled). NOT accepted — if it comes back, the sweep must surface it.
_notDeliberatelyOmitted.auth_leaked_password_protection: FIXED by the owner (enabled). NOT accepted — if it regresses, surface it.
